ogTitle: Weyba Downs vs Wharps: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Weyba Downs and Wharps.
heading: Weyba Downs vs Wharps — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Weyba Downs, Queensland and Wharps, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wharps has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Weyba Downs (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Weyba Downs or Wharps safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Weyba Downs has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Wharps scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Weyba Downs scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Wharps scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Weyba Downs or Wharps?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wharps has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
